_readme: Copied to economy.json on first run; edit that file and use 'Reload economy.json' in the mod settings. 'defaults' sets baseline servicing for every station; 'stations' overrides the auto-derived economy per yard. Per-station keys: recipes; defaultCap and caps (storage capacity in whole carloads, also the demand cap); role ('load' | 'unload' | 'both'); remoteLoad / remoteUnload (does station staff service cars parked anywhere in the yard); remoteSecondsPerCar (staff time cost per car). Example: "HB": { "role": "unload", "remoteUnload": false } makes harbor a sink you must service at the quay. Cargo names are the game's CargoType enum names. Unknown yard or cargo names are skipped with a log warning, so this file cannot break a load.
